rationale: The cited paper appears highly relevant rather than incidental: it examines neural responses during trailer viewing to predict both individual preferences and population-level commercial success beyond self-reports, which closely matches the citing paper’s focus on neural prediction of ad liking and aggregate out-of-sample outcomes beyond self-report baselines. Given this strong conceptual overlap in brain-to-market prediction claims (also reflected in the cited title and DOI match), this pair should be retained for full relation judgment.
